title: Claims Batch Processing — Troubleshooting Guide
content:
The Claims_Processing_Daily workflow runs every day at 06:00 IST. It reads batch files from /data/claims/batch_YYYYMMDD.csv and processes insurance claims. Common failure modes:

1. Missing input file: The upstream Input_File_Generator workflow did not produce the batch file. Check if Input_File_Generator completed successfully. Resolution: trigger Input_File_Generator manually, then restart Claims_Processing_Daily.

2. File format error: The batch CSV has unexpected columns or encoding. Check the file with check_input_file tool. Resolution: contact the data team to regenerate the file.

3. Database connection timeout: The claims database is overloaded during peak hours. Resolution: retry after 30 minutes or check database health.

4. Downstream impact: If Claims_Processing_Daily fails, the following workflows will also fail: Report_Aggregator, Email_Notification, Reconciliation_Daily.
